required_fields: model_id; freeze_timestamp; coefficient_sources; train_rows; runtime_inputs; source_property_labels; admission_gate_status
purpose: prove the model was frozen before held-out/external scoring
release_rule: must exist before holdout or external rows are joined

required_fields: case_id; split_claim_class; prediction_model_id; mdot_pred; T_pred; branch_heat_pred; pressure_terms; thermal_terms; root_status; runtime_audit_status
purpose: store raw predictions and residual components
release_rule: holdout/external rows score only after freeze

required_fields: mdot_error; branch_heat_error; Tmean_error; loop_delta_error; TP_RMSE; TW_RMSE; all_probe_RMSE; pressure_residual_norm; thermal_residual_norm; uncertainty_status
purpose: separate train, development validation/support, holdout, and external claims
release_rule: no aggregate table may merge train with holdout/external without separate columns

required_fields: runtime_gate; source_property_gate; pressure_gate; thermal_gate; recirculation_gate; sensor_gate; uncertainty_gate; decision; blocker_ids
release_rule: admission requires all gates pass on their declared split roles

required_fields: pressure_owner; thermal_owner; residual_family; residual_value; evidence_class; blocker_id; source_path
purpose: explain why errors remain after prediction
release_rule: residual rows may be diagnostic even when case score is allowed
